title: The Most-Sold Guru Stocks of the 2nd Quarter
text: The second quarter of 2022 saw the U.S. Federal Reserve continue hiking interest rates as inflation remained sky-high. Unless companies can raise their profits more than 9% year over year to surpass inflation, they are effectively seeing their profits decrease on an inflation-adjusted basis, which is not exactly a recipe for a bull market.

title: 4 Electronics Stocks to Escape Pandemic-Led Disruptions
text: The pandemic-led disruptions hurt the Zacks Electronics - Miscellaneous Components industry. Industry players like TEL, NVT, TTMI and CTS are set to gain from IoT and automation prospects.

title: How Inflation Boosted This Electronics Distributor Amid Supplier Losses
text: The loss of two big suppliers during the Covid pandemic didn't stop electronics distributor Avnet from rebounding as the crisis eased. The post How Inflation Boosted This Electronics Distributor Amid Supplier Losses appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.
